case_title: JULISA HIGGS VS. GOLDEN GATE DISPOSAL & RECYCLING COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2012 - JUDGMENT.
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 7/27/12 TO PLAINTIFF JULISA HIGGS, "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS/UNABLE TO FORWARD".

CASTRO. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
